_comment: Per-layer provenance status for the Health Equity Atlas. Layers with status=pending_data show 'data unavailable' via Guard 3. Each entry tracks the declared source, current data coverage, and the remediation PR scope. Update when a layer is wired to a real source.

layers.label: Compound Access Deficit
layers.actual_source: Access Michigan Index formula - derived from verified inputs (CHR, USDA, FCC)

layers.label: Uninsured Rate
layers.actual_source: County Health Rankings 2025 (ACS-derived uninsured rate) via michigan-county-profiles.ts:h[0]

layers.label: Infant Mortality Rate
layers.actual_source: MDHHS Division for Vital Records and Health Statistics, 2019-2023 five-year average
layers.coverage: 0/83 until maternal_infant_health Supabase table seeded via seed-maternal-health.ts
layers.suppression_policy: Counties with fewer than 6 events render null per MDHHS policy
layers.remediation_pr: this PR - wiring complete, awaiting CSV seed

layers.label: Food Desert Tracts
layers.actual_source: USDA Food Access Research Atlas 2019 via useFoodAccess.ts (lowAccessPct)
layers.coverage: 7/83 counties with real USDA data; 76/83 null (Guard 3)
layers.issue: Metric rendered is low-access % not food desert tract count. Label mismatch.
layers.remediation_pr: separate - wire USDA tract-level data for all 83 counties; fix metric label

layers.label: Poverty Rate
layers.actual_source: None - h[2] is food insecurity rate not ACS poverty; same data as food_desert layer
layers.coverage: 0/83 counties with correct ACS poverty data (Guard 3 on mobile; desktop also null now)
layers.issue: Metric and source both wrong. Poverty layer renders same data as food_desert.
layers.remediation_pr: separate - wire ACS B17001 poverty rate for all 83 counties

layers.label: Broadband % Unserved
layers.actual_source: FCC National Broadband Map 2024 via useBroadbandData.ts
layers.coverage: 10/83 counties on desktop map; 0/83 on mobile (Guard 3)
layers.remediation_pr: separate - ingest FCC BDC 2024 for all 83 counties; wire to mobile grid

layers.label: Energy Burden %
layers.coverage: 7/83 counties on desktop map; 0/83 on mobile (Guard 3)
layers.remediation_pr: separate - ingest ACEEE LEAD 2023 for all 83 counties; wire to mobile grid

layers.label: EJ Index (max)
layers.actual_source: FEMA National Risk Index 2023 compositeRisk (WRONG SOURCE - not EPA EJScreen)
layers.coverage: 7/83 counties with FEMA NRI data; all null (Guard 3) due to source mismatch
layers.issue: Source mismatch: FEMA NRI compositeRisk != EPA EJScreen percentile. Different metrics.
layers.remediation_pr: separate - ingest EPA EJScreen county-level percentiles; fix declared source

layers.label: ALICE Rate (Below Threshold)
layers.actual_source: United Way ALICE Report Michigan 2025 via aliceData.ts
layers.coverage: 7/83 counties on desktop map; 0/83 on mobile (Guard 3 - case was missing from switch)
layers.remediation_pr: separate - ingest United For ALICE 2025 for all 83 counties; wire to mobile grid

layers.label: Pharmacy Access Risk
layers.actual_source: None - was pure countyType proxy (rural 70 / suburban 30 / urban 10); no NCPDP data ingested
layers.issue: No verified source wired. Proxy was fabricated categorical values.
layers.remediation_pr: separate - ingest NCPDP 2024 pharmacy desert data for all 83 counties
